mapper.select: select nav_id as navId, nav_name as navName, nav_class as navClass, nav_ip as navIp, nav_link as navLink, nav_show as navShow, nav_blank as navBlank, nav_level as navLevel, nav_parent_name as navParentName, nav_order as navOrder, nav_name_en as navNameEn from DGN_NAVBAR where nav_show = '1'
select nav_show from DGN_NAVBAR where nav_name = #{name}

select nav_id as navId, nav_name as navName, nav_class as navClass, nav_ip as navIp, nav_link as navLink, nav_show as navShow, nav_blank as navBlank, nav_level as navLevel, nav_parent_name as navParentName, nav_order as navOrder, nav_name_en as navNameEn, nav_redirect as redirect, nav_hidden as navHidden from DGN_NAVBAR where nav_show = '1'
